about.intro: A cozy community for succulent lovers. We believe every leaf deserves care.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.body: We want every succulent grower to find kindred spirits here. Whether you're a balcony beginner or a greenhouse veteran, share, learn and meet friends in RouYou.

rules.title: Community guidelines
rules.item1: Respect fellow members; no personal attacks
rules.item3: Use certified channels for trades to avoid scams
rules.item4: Prefer original photos; credit sources on reposts

tech.title: Tech
tech.demo: This is a demo site. Data is mocked; state persists locally on refresh.

contact.title: Contact
contact.wechat: 💬 WeChat group: DM an admin to join
